title: Pre-registration — Obscura Intel v0.1 event study
summary: Pre-registered event-study methodology (universe, event definition, entry rule, returns model, hypotheses, robustness plan, kill criterion) committed before joining event data to price data.
notes: MANIFEST_TYPE declared this ADR and was treated as authoritative per process. Content itself does not follow ADR conventions (no Context/Decision/Consequences sections, no explicit Status field) -- it is structurally a pre-registered analysis protocol/methodology commitment for a statistical study, closer to a locked specification than an architectural decision. Document language ('Committed before any join of event data...', gate-pass results already recorded) suggests it functions as a de facto locked commitment, but absent an explicit 'Status: Accepted' marker, locked was conservatively left false per taxonomy rule. Synthesizer should treat this as a high-precedence locked-methodology source regardless of the strict ADR/locked field values.
